name: codex-terminal-recorder
description: Capture terminal context, switch Codex accounts, and track per-profile cooldowns directly in VS Code.

commands.title: Send to Codex: Open Log Directory
Send to Codex: Open Diagnostics Log
Send to Codex: Open Active Terminal Log
Send to Codex: Toggle Diagnostics Logging
Send to Codex: Toggle Diagnostics Log File
Send to Codex: Locate Active Terminal Selection
Codex Switch: Login via Codex CLI
Codex Switch: Add Profile from Current auth.json
Codex Switch: Add Profile from File

enumDescriptions: Recommended mode: attach a structured Markdown context bundle with the related terminal command, the selected text, the exact source line range, deduplicated nearby context, and a path to the immutable terminal snapshot file for this selection.
Current mode: the editor stays closed and Codex receives a separate attachment file with the selected terminal context.
Legacy mode: the extension opens the snapshot .txt, selects the needed lines there, and sends them as an editor selection like a normal editor selection.
codexTerminalRecorder.terminalContextSen.description: Choose how terminal context is sent to Codex.

enumDescriptions: Read the current terminal selection from the proposed VS Code terminal API and find its last occurrence in the plain-text terminal log.
Read the current terminal selection from the proposed VS Code terminal API and resolve its location using the plain-text log plus a sidecar line index file.
Read copied text from the clipboard and find its last occurrence in the plain-text terminal log. Useful when terminal selection access is unavailable or unreliable.
codexTerminalRecorder.selectionTrackingS.description: Choose how terminal selection text is captured and mapped back to the terminal log files.

codexTerminalRecorder.selectionContextLi.description: Number of surrounding lines to include around the resolved terminal selection when preparing context for Codex.

codexTerminalRecorder.showNativeTerminal.description: Show a native platform popup action near the cursor when terminal text selection becomes available.

codexTerminalRecorder.showNativeEditorSe.description: Show a native platform popup action near the cursor when editor text selection becomes available.

codexTerminalRecorder.showCodexSelection.description: Show a fallback status bar button for sending the active terminal selection to Codex Chat.

codexTerminalRecorder.showCodexEditorSel.description: Show a fallback status bar button for sending the active editor selection to Codex Chat.

codexTerminalRecorder.maxFileSizeMb.description: Maximum size in megabytes to keep per terminal recording file.

codexTerminalRecorder.logDirectory.markdownDescription: Directory where terminal recording files are stored. Leave empty to use the extension storage directory outside the workspace (recommended). Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder; absolute paths are used as-is. [Open recordings folder](command:codexTerminalRecorder.openLogDirectory)

codexTerminalRecorder.diagnosticsLogging.description: Enable diagnostic logging for extension internals.

codexTerminalRecorder.diagnosticsLogFile.markdownDescription: Write diagnostics into a local log file when diagnostics logging is enabled. [Open diagnostics log](command:codexTerminalRecorder.openDiagnosticsLog)

codexSwitch.debugLogging.description: Enable additional diagnostic logging for account switching and profile sync.

codexSwitch.activeProfileScope.description: Choose whether the active profile is shared across every workspace or stored per workspace.

codexSwitch.storageMode.description: Choose where saved profile tokens are stored.

codexSwitch.reloadWindowAfterProfileSwit.description: Reload the VS Code window immediately after switching the active Codex profile. This is the most reliable way to restart the official Codex extension with the selected auth.json.

codexSwitch.statusBarClickBehavior.description: Choose whether clicking the Codex profile status bar item cycles profiles or toggles back to the previous one.
enumDescriptions: Toggle between the active profile and the previous profile.

codexRatelimit.enableLogging.description: Enable detailed rate-limit logging for debugging purposes.

codexRatelimit.showOutputOnError.description: Reserved for compatibility with the original Codex rate-limit tracker settings.

codexRatelimit.preferUsageApi.description: Query the Codex usage API for the active profile before falling back to local session files.

codexRatelimit.color.enable.description: Color the combined Codex profile status based on current rate-limit pressure.

codexRatelimit.color.criticalColor.description: Color used when the current profile is cooling down or has crossed the critical usage threshold.

codexRatelimit.color.criticalThreshold.description: Usage percentage threshold for the critical state.

codexRatelimit.color.warningColor.description: Color used when the current profile crosses the warning usage threshold.

codexRatelimit.color.warningThreshold.description: Usage percentage threshold for the warning state.

codexRatelimit.sessionPath.description: Custom path to Codex sessions (leave empty to use ~/.codex/sessions).

codexRatelimit.refreshInterval.description: How often the per-profile rate-limit monitor refreshes, in seconds.
